case_title: LEVASSEUR, GREGORY VS DUMAS, MICHAEL DR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $569.13 FILED BY LEVASSEUR, GREGORY AS TO DEFENDANT DUMAS, MICHAEL DR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEVASSEUR, GREGORY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUMAS, MICHAEL DR. $569.13 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $589.13 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DUMAS, MICHAEL DR.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DUMAS, MICHAEL DR.
